name: SSE Stream Rewriter
description: Example main-scope plugin: rewrites streaming SSE token responses (OpenAI/Anthropic-style) live via api.network.transformStream, and captures the streamed text. Requires config cdpStreamTransform=true.
author: desktop-proxy
